Name: Rostakov Tong
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

The infamous Rostakov Tong trace their origins to ancient Asian criminal societies on Terra. Their reputation is built on the idea that if someone challenges their territory, their businesses, or their authority, the response will be immediate, public, and memorable.

Reputation with the criminal underworld isn't about cordial relations. After all, such organisations are often in conflict. Rather, it represents a Mercenary Company's criminal street cred, or conversely their actions acting as the various Houses police force.
ReputationStatements: Ordinarily, Tong business is handled by Tong members. Circumstances have forced an exception.
This contract concerns matters within our territory. Do not mistake access for trust.
Outsiders rarely understand the consequences of failure here.
There’s profit hidden in chaos, mercenary. Help us uncover it.
Visibility matters. We need this lesson understood by more than the immediate participants.
The target has challenged our interests. Such challenges require a response, Commander
When strength must be demonstrated, you rarely disappoint. The Tong honors you.
MissionSuccessStatements: Word will spread quickly. We intend for it to.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The lesson may not have been learned today. It can be taught again later.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The Tong's authority is measured by its response. Yours was inadequate.
